text: Partial/lazy graph rendering (dotted stubs, load on click)
description: General capability (also valuable for large single repos): support graphs too big to fully load. Unloaded aims render as dotted-outline stubs with no loaded info. Clicking a stub loads the aim and reveals its relatives as new dotted stubs. The store holds a mix of loaded aims and stubs; value calc treats stubs as boundary leaves. This is the substrate cross-repo rendering builds on (externals are just stubs from another repo).
